<!-- Generated by box-gantry. DO NOT EDIT. -->
# Pagination

Marker- and offset-paginated list operations return an `AsyncIterableIterator`
that yields one entry at a time, threading the cursor for you — the list method
*is* the paginator, so drive it directly with `for await ... of`:

```ts
for await (const item of client.folders.listItems(folderId)) {
// use item
}
```

It walks every page until the response has no next cursor (or an empty page, for
offset pagination), and owns a private copy of the options you pass, so your
value is never mutated. The wire cursor (`next_marker` / `offset`, verbatim per
TR-TS.2) is threaded through the options for you.
